name: Chi-Square Wavelet Graph Neural Networks for Heterogeneous Graph Anomaly Detection

description: arXiv:2505.18934v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) in heterogeneous networks presents unique challenges due to node and edge heterogeneity. Existing Graph Neural Network (GNN) methods primarily focus on homogeneous GAD and thus fail to address three key issues: (C1) Capturing abnormal signal and rich semantics across diverse meta-paths; (C2) Retaining high-f...
author: Xiping Li, Xiangyu Dong, Xingyi Zhang, Kun Xie, Yuanhao Feng, Bo Wang, Guilin Li, Wuxiong Zeng, Xiujun Shu, Sibo Wang
